query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_cycles,
  COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as unique_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) as unique_devices,
  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NULL OR userId = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_user_cycles,
  SUM(CASE WHEN deviceId IS NULL OR deviceId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_device_cycles
FROM cycle_history;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_attempts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as unique_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) as unique_devices,
  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NULL OR userId = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_user_attempts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN deviceId IS NULL OR deviceId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_device_attempts
FROM puzzle_attempts
